task_completion.description: Agent opens the target HTML file in a text editor.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a text editor (e.g., nano, vim, gedit, VS Code) displaying the contents of /home/ga/Documents/landing_page.html.

task_completion.description: Agent updates the Matomo tracker URL to the local instance.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the tracking code block in the editor where the URL is set to http://localhost/ (e.g., var u="http://localhost/";).

task_completion.description: Agent updates the Matomo Site ID to 1.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the tracking code block in the editor where the site ID is set to 1 (e.g., _paq.push(['setSiteId', '1']);).

task_completion.description: Agent adds the heartbeat timer configuration set to 10 seconds.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the exact line _paq.push(['enableHeartBeatTimer', 10]); added to the Matomo tracking script in the text editor.

task_completion.description: Agent opens the updated landing page in Firefox.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Firefox browser open with the address bar showing file:///home/ga/Documents/landing_page.html and the 'Summer Sale' page rendered.

task_completion.description: Agent verifies the visit is recorded in the Matomo database or keeps the page open for at least 15 seconds.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the agent checking the Matomo dashboard at http://localhost/, querying the database to confirm the visit for 'Summer Sale Landing Page', or evidence (like terminal sleep commands or system clock changes) that the Firefox page was left open for at least 15 seconds.

integrity.description: Agent used a text editor to modify the HTML file interactively.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for a standard text editor interface (nano, vim, gedit, VS Code) being used to edit the file, rather than blind terminal commands like echo or sed without checking the contents.

integrity.description: Agent used a real browser to trigger the JavaScript tracking code.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for the Firefox GUI. The agent should not just use curl or wget on the HTML file, as those tools do not execute JavaScript and would fail to trigger the Matomo tracker.

integrity.description: Agent did not fake the Matomo dashboard record using browser developer tools.
integrity.visual_evidence: If the Matomo dashboard is shown, ensure the browser developer tools (Inspect Element) are not open and being used to manipulate the DOM to fake a visit record.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target file is located at /home/ga/Documents/landing_page.html. The correct Matomo tracking URL to insert is http://localhost/. The correct Site ID is 1. The heartbeat timer must be set to 10 seconds using _paq.push(['enableHeartBeatTimer', 10]);. The page title to look for in Firefox or Matomo records is 'Summer Sale Landing Page'.
